title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Momonosuke, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What?! Why?! Kaido is still alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He won't be able to sustain his flame clouds much longer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's up to you now!! You need to make clouds strong enough to hold onigashima!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This was always our only option!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 10 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
